title: Learning with Errors assumption for encryption
abstract: We study LWE samples and error distributions in a cryptographic setting.
notes: LWE should not imply RLWE or MLWE.

title: Ring-LWE parameter selection
abstract: The work focuses on RLWE over cyclotomic rings.
notes: RLWE should not imply MLWE.

title: Module-LWE security estimates
abstract: MLWE instances are evaluated for module-lattice KEM parameters.
notes: Module-LWE should be distinct from Ring-LWE.

title: Short Integer Solution commitments
abstract: The SIS assumption is used for a commitment construction.
notes: SIS should not imply Module-SIS.

title: Module-SIS primitive with parameter estimation
abstract: MSIS assumptions support a module lattice construction.
notes: Module-SIS needs its own tag.

title: Ring-SIS signatures
abstract: RSIS is used for a ring lattice signature proof.
notes: Ring-SIS should be distinct from Module-SIS.

title: BKZ experiments with G6K and fplll
abstract: We compare lattice reduction, sieving and enumeration baselines.
notes: Reduction tags should be recognized without AI.

title: Dual use hybrid vehicle design
abstract: The primal objective is energy efficiency in a hybrid engine.
notes: Plain English dual/primal/hybrid should not become lattice attacks.

title: Hybrid attack on sparse LWE
abstract: The primal attack and dual attack are compared for LWE cryptanalysis.
notes: Attack tags require lattice context.

title: Transformer for image classification
abstract: A vision transformer model for generic computer vision tasks.
notes: Generic AI must not trigger AI4Lattice.

title: Transformer LWE cryptanalysis
abstract: A transformer model ranks LWE samples for lattice cryptanalysis.
notes: Transformer plus LWE should be AI4Lattice.

title: Swin-guided coordinate selection for RLWE and MLWE
abstract: Shifted window attention supports coordinate selection for Ring-LWE and Module-LWE hybrid attacks.
notes: Swin-guided coordinate selection is a core AI4Lattice case.

title: Negative-cyclic modeling for RLWE samples
abstract: Negacyclic shift and negative-cyclic structure model RLWE polynomial rings.
notes: Negative-cyclic RLWE modeling should be visible to AI4Lattice workflows.

title: FHE application for private analytics
abstract: A homomorphic encryption application uses CKKS for analytics workloads.
notes: FHE application should not become lattice attack.

title: CKKS BFV BGV TFHE bootstrapping
abstract: The benchmark compares bootstrapping and key switching in FHE schemes.
notes: FHE family tags should be recognized.

title: ML-KEM Kyber implementation
abstract: A Module-Lattice-Based Key-Encapsulation Mechanism implementation uses Kyber.
notes: ML-KEM/Kyber should not imply ML-DSA.

title: ML-DSA Dilithium rejection sampling
abstract: The Module-Lattice-Based Digital Signature Algorithm is analyzed with CRYSTALS-Dilithium.
notes: ML-DSA should be separate from ML-KEM.

title: Falcon and FN-DSA signing
abstract: Falcon / FN-DSA signatures use lattice trapdoors.
notes: Falcon/FN-DSA should be recognized when explicit.

title: Falcon-X time series forecasting
abstract: A generic forecasting model for multivariate time series.
notes: Falcon-X must not become Falcon/FN-DSA.

title: Constant-time side-channel and fault attack audit
abstract: The audit checks timing attack, cache attack, masking and fault injection for ML-KEM.
notes: Implementation security tags support Zotero filtering.

title: Module-SIS chameleon hash primitive
abstract: A Module-SIS Chameleon Hash and commitment construction with parameter estimation.
notes: Short-term primitive line.

title: SIS commitment scheme
abstract: A SIS Commitment from Short Integer Solution without module structure.
notes: Plain SIS commitment should not imply Module-SIS.

title: Lattice-based ZK-friendly post-quantum privacy primitive
abstract: A lattice-based ZK construction for anonymous credential and commitment systems.
notes: ZK-friendly PQ privacy should be primitive/privacy, not attack.

title: Toy LWE benchmark with small parameters
abstract: Synthetic toy benchmark instances for LWE experiments and small-parameter validation.
notes: Toy benchmark should be marked cautiously.

title: Graph neural network for route planning
abstract: A GNN model improves generic combinatorial optimization benchmarks.
notes: Generic ML without cryptographic context is out of AI4Lattice.

title: NTRU lattice attack
abstract: The NTRU lattice is evaluated with a lattice reduction attack.
notes: NTRU should be separate from LWE.

title: Learning with Rounding in module lattices
abstract: LWR and Module-LWR are used for encryption.
notes: LWR is distinct from LWE.

title: Discrete Gaussian trapdoor sampling
abstract: Gaussian sampling and gadget matrix trapdoor sampling for lattice trapdoors.
notes: Sampling tags support primitive/security proof workflows.

title: NTT polynomial multiplication for embedded PQC
abstract: Number theoretic transform, Montgomery reduction and Barrett reduction on ARM Cortex-M.
notes: Implementation benchmark is not automatically an attack.

title: Lattice estimator cost model
abstract: Core-SVP, root Hermite factor, GSA and block size estimates for LWE.
notes: Estimator metadata should support parameter audit.
